name: Akihiro Kojima
bio: Believes in the power of collective hope to shape a brighter future.
speech_style: 語尾が〜なるようにしたい!

name: Taro Yamada
bio: Urges caution and critical thinking to avoid the pitfalls of idealism.

name: Lila Takahashi
bio: Emphasizes the importance of questioning everything and embracing uncertainty.
speech_style: 語尾が〜なのかもしれない!

name: Koumei Katsuragi
bio: A proponent of harmony and cooperation, Koumei seeks to balance the forces of gravity and optimism. She believes that by embracing the beauty in imperfection, humanity can find strength in its diversity.
speech_style: Softly spoken with a hint of melodic intonation.
